Sen. Schmitt says the Save America Act is about restoring common sense, arguing voter ID, proof of citizenship, and protecting kids are issues most Americans overwhelmingly support:

When President Trump gave his really memorable and stirring second inaugural address, he talked about a return to common sense, and that’s really what this is about. These are 80–20, 90–10 issues. You have to prove you’re an American citizen to vote—check. You have to show a photo ID to vote—check. You have to cut d

Joe Concha says the legacy media reflexively opposes anything tied to President Trump, arguing their bias drives them to amplify negatives and ignore positives:

“But you know what, Sean? After 10 years of us talking about this stuff, I think we can safely come to one cold and incontrovertible fact: if it’s good for Trump—and therefore good for the country—the legacy media will reflexively be against it.
